post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 231

Traitor Mafia

If you're not alive in this game, do not post in this thread. To join a game, visit the Mafia Players Sign-ups.

Game has ended, anyone may post.

Credits to various others for this ruleset.
  • General
    • Read all of the rules.
    • Do not post during the night phase.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mod, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderator.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
    • Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent].
    • Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON.
    • Day 1 will start as soon as posting is allowed. If you’ve read the rules summarize the traitor role in your role PM.
    • Private chat(s) will be via QuickTopic; however, if all members agree to use Discord, then the mod will set it up for them.
    • If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate, and access to the spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered.
    • Do not impersonate the mod.
    • Do not lie to the mod.
    • Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.
  • Voting/Hanging
    • Votes must be in the format "Vote: [player username] to be counted.
    • Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized correctly. Do not use nicknames.
    • For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical.
    • Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is bolded, even with separate bold tags, are invalid.
    • For example, Vote: Scipio1 and Vote: sCiPiO1 are valid votes, whereas Vote:Scipio1, Vote: Scipio, Vote: Scipio1., Vote: Scipio1, and Vote: Scipio1 are not.
    • Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
    • You may vote to hang no one by posting Vote: No Hang. Note that this one must be capitalized correctly, unlike normal votes.
    • You may unvote by posting Unvote. You do not have to unvote before voting again.
    • Invalid votes will not be counted under any circumstances. I will do my best to detect fakevotes; however, if you plan to fakevote, you must notify me via role PM for a guarantee that the vote will not count.
    • The moment deadline passes or a player reaches a majority of the votes, they will be hanged. It will then be twilight. Players are allowed to post during twilight, but no votes will be counted. Twilight ends when the mod makes the official end of day post.
    • This game uses deadline hang: the player with the most votes at the EOD (End of Day) deadline will be hanged.
    • If there is a tie at the deadline, the player who reached the number of votes first will be hanged.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur. If there is a tie between a player and No Hang at deadline, No Hang will occur.
    • Votes are never locked.
    • The moment the deadline occurs, no further votes will be counted.
    • If the deadline has passed or a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
    • Once the moderator declares the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.
  • Activity
    • All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
    • Each mafia day will be 288 hours (12 days).
    • Each mafia night will be 48 hours (2 days).
    • The moderator may extend deadlines at his discretion; however, note that this is unlikely.
    • The deadline for night actions is one hour before the night deadline.
    • If a player's night action isn't submitted by the NA deadline, they will lose their opportunity to submit a night action.
    • Night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • Night will end when the moderator makes a post declaring the end of night. You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mod for updates in the case of a missed deadline.
    • Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Limited Access) by posting the V/LA dates in bold in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded.
    • V/LA's must be 4 days or shorter.
    • Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting Request Replacement in-thread or in their role PM.
    • Players who have replaced out will not be allowed to replace back in.
    • Players will receive an in-game prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 36 hours and are not on V/LA.
    • Players will receive a PM Prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 60 hours and are not on V/LA.
    • Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 84 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • If a player receives 3 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
    • If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
    • If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderator will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
    • If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced.
  • Etiquette
    • Do not gamethrow.
    • Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, and other interactions with the moderator.
    • Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive inter-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
    • Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably think as alignment indicative.
    • Do not make personal attacks.
    • Do not spam.
    • Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
    • Follow AoPS Community Guidelines.
    • Be mature and use common sense.
    • If a player has too many minor rule infractions (up to moderator discretion), they will be force-replaced.
  • Moderator Information
    • Scipio1 is the moderator of Mafia Game 231. This is my mod color. Don't use it.
    • This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access to the server as appropriate.
    • Red text is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderator. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
    • Blue text is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderator.
    • Green text is used for town flavor-related text.
    • Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes.
    • The Not Voting section should be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • If an error in the votecount is not pointed out within 2 days or by the next EOD, whichever is sooner, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • The moderator has the final say.

Public Setup Information
  • This game is guaranteed to be 3 Mafia vs 10 Townies.
  • One member of the Mafia will be a Mafia Traitor. The Mafia Traitor knows both members of the mafia and will receive their role PMs, but the main mafia members will not know who the traitor is.
  • If the mafia attempt to kill the traitor, then nothing will happen.
  • The traitor will appear as a Vanilla Townie to any investigative role.
  • The traitor will inherit the mafia factional kill if all other mafia members are dead.
  • All private threads will have daytalk.

VT Role PM

You have no abilities besides your vote and your voice.

You win when all threats to town are eliminated.

Felicityhe wrote:
what does rand mean?

It's short for "random", but its exact meaning depends on context.

When you say ">rand town", you're saying someone is more likely to be town than just the base probability of town/total players.
When you use it as a verb, like "randed town" or "randed scum", you're saying that's the role they got from the RNG.
When you use it as a noun, like "town rand" or "scum rand", that's just the random selection of town/scum/whatever.

euler is claiming: mafia will kill them tonight.
euler is fakeclaiming: mafia will not kill them tonight.

NK euler: standard, best choice for scum.
Don't NK euler: we have to hang them tomorrow, but we get the chance for a hypothetical cop to investigate them.

Disclaimer: I know that I can be extremely confbiased at certain points, and because I have been scumread non-stop the whole game, my reads may or may not be correct. I almost messed up 222 for my confidence in mj being scum, and so don't take the reads too strongly. Plus, sadly I'm not a godlike mafia player so ;-;.

Osmium_: Honestly, I have practically no idea how to read osmium. I do see some controversial opinions, and I'm probably going to look more into him. Null.
‣ Probably just scum honestly, so yeah. Don't see how he's matching his town meta at all, and the amount of fluff is more than usual. Scum.

Socoobo: Although really annoying when attacking me, every post comes in from a very towny perspective and honestly I can't see anything from him coming from scum. Pretty sure no one needs any examples or lengthy explanations for this one. Townread.
‣ Town.

rosecasket: Okay, now this is a spot that I really need to look into. From when they first replaced in, they immediately started scumreading me with, fmpov, weird logic, but I'm not gonna dwell on that. Actually, you know what, I am. I find it actually really bad how rose says they didn't even read 300-1300 yet ( which is probably an excuse tbh ), and yet they have a really confident read on me that they somehow got the evidence to back up. I've stated this attack already, but I think it's better if I repeat it again here since I don't think anyone was listening to me the entire game. Also, after this whole fight with me apparently they had no idea why they were attacking me and said they were kinda just making things up as they went? Honestly, I'm like so confused on this read right now, because later on they had some really towny places but I can't just ignore the period when they just replaced in, when they are the most vulnerable as scum. Also, I do remember a few really towny posts, but there isn't a much spots left for scum .-. Null, leaning towards Town..
‣ After going through the posts more, I'm probably sure they're town for an undisclosed reason and because the posts are really towny and natural. Town, still in POE though.

avanders: I'm not really sure of how avan usually plays, but honestly I don't think that means much. Right now I'm looking at #838 while typing this, and even just that one post is enough to be a strong townread. Hopefully he can be slightly more active and get some more reads out because it's not gonna be a fun lylo tomorrow. Apparently avan is still in the POEs of some people and I have to say he is definitely more townier that some other people you have as confs. Just to be sure, I ISOed him and everything was just so. towny. Everything is in a very game-solving attitude, including constant reviews of his reads and changes in them ( which happens so less nowadays it's kinda funny ), and all of the thoughts coming out were so pure. Someone needs to go take a closer look at his posts. Eh, I guess I'm also pretty thankful that he read me right from the start, with valid arguments lol. Townread.
‣ This read I'm not too sure now actually, and if I were to trustfall it would be avan, but don't hang him before all other two scum are out. Town, for now at least.

juliankuang: Town, convince me otherwise. Don't want to spend time elaborating on this. omg i just realized julian is still Townread.

BobDBuilder321: I literally have so much paranoia on this read and I really don't like how bob has been acting D3, fmpov trying to put up some sort of interaction with me that cleared him? Idrk, but right after I tried to get him to wait for this post. Okay, I am literally so confused right now, what with all bob is doing. So he tries to divert the hang to rose. Great. Goes back. Great. Goes back again. Great. Goes back one more time. Great. Bob what is happening. In all seriousness, though, I really don't have a good feeling about this spot and it's possible he's scum. Okay bob has so many posts I am not anticipating the ISO I'm going to get. Probably going over aops character limit. Scumlean.
‣ Spoilers: go look at the iso. Anyways, I don't really want to look through all of his spots but he's probably just scum ok. Scum.

bigmath: wait but he exists??? I mean, violet was pretty towny though, although I'm really not sure about this spot. I honestly haven't registered him since he replaced in, and I don't really think he's done anything at all. Null.
‣ So, I realized that bigmath replaced violet, so honestly I kinda just looked into violet more, because she's much more easier to read. Right, so everything was super towny, no question. Town.

Felicityhe: Woah, last one. Except for the first read post that led me to attack them, nothing else was exclusively towny. Ahhhh I haven't really registered this spot yet, I only remember them saying "yea we're just waiting for snow's legacy post" soooo. Scumlean.
‣ Okay, after finishing my iso, tbh I don't really think they are necessarily scummy, but the thing is that there are two other people that are townier. Nothing really was towny too, and some interactions were kinda bad. Plus, except for two readlists they have practically claimed "my brain is dying ill do this later". Scum.

Summary: My towncore is [julian, scb, avan, snow], not that that matters to some of you. Hence, my poe is [bigmath, felicity, adra, bob, osmium]. Bigmath is actually probably town, adra too. Avan can fall if there is no spots left. fmpov scumteam is [bob, felicity, osmium]

Roleblock: Target a player to be roleblocked. This player's night actions, if any, will be prevented from resolving. You also have the ability to multitask (perform the roleblock simultaneously with the factional kill).
